title: View board folders in My Work
excerpt:
Hello, we use “My Work” a lot.

posts.author: Nolwenn.BZL (BIZEUL)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, we use “My Work” a lot.
We have structured our boards by folders and we would like to know which folder the task refers to in “My work”. Indeed, it is only possible to see the board in which the task is located but not the folder in which the board is located.

posts.author: maxhenny2 (Max H)
posts.cookedHtml: Our organization would like to see a fix to this too. It’s hard to find what folder/workspace the item is connected to in “my work” when you have dozens of boards!

posts.author: laureesplanade (Laure P)
posts.cookedHtml: Our organization would like this feature as well.
